prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan TB48DE (4.8L inline-6) with forged internals: CP pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Pair with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (0.96 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 272° camshaft for 450+ hp at 18 psi on E85 fuel.

Full custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 304-grade downpipe and a custom-fabricated 6-into-1 header designed for the Y61’s chassis. Include a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a Tomei Type-S wastegate for precise turbo management.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (remote reservoirs, 3-way adjustable damping) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the front control arms. Reinforce the Y61’s ladder frame with a custom bolt-in roll cage by Custom Cages UK, designed to retain the Safari’s 4-door layout while improving torsional rigidity by 40%.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB-SAFARI Y61 kit, modified to fit the Y61’s unique wheelbase and fender flares. Pair with custom 18x10.5 ET-15 forged wheels by Work Equip 03 (bronze finish) and Nitto Trail Grappler 35x12.50R18 tires for aggressive stance and off-road capability.

Full custom front bumper with integrated winch mount (Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum) and a 3D-printed carbon fiber grille by Seibon, featuring a matte black finish and a relocated Nissan emblem. Add a custom LED light bar setup by Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro 50-inch) with a custom aluminum mount designed to clear the Safari’s hood scoop.

Interior overhaul with Recaro SR-7F seats (custom-molded to fit the Y61’s mounting points) and a full Alcantara headliner by Katzkin. Replace the stock dashboard with a custom carbon fiber overlay by Varis, housing a Motec C127 dash display and a custom switch panel for auxiliary controls (e.g., diff lock, air suspension).
